updaterWelcomeDescription:
This will update AllyFSE to version %ls on your system.

Click Update to proceed or Cancel to exit.
installerWelcomeDescription:
This will install AllyFSE version %ls to your system.

Click Next to proceed or Cancel to exit.
licenseDescription: AllyFSE is free software, distributed under terms of MIT License in the hope that it will be useful, but WITHOUT ANY WARRANTY; without even the implied warranty of MERCHANTABILITY or FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE.
uninstallerWelcomeDescription:
This will remove AllyFSE from your system.

Click Uninstall to proceed or Cancel to exit.
installerDoneDescription:
AllyFSE installation has been completed.

Press Configure change settings.
uninstallerDoneDescription: AllyFSE has been removed from your system.
uninstallerInsufficientPermissionsDescri:
Elevated privileges are required to remove AllyFSE.

Please run the uninstaller as Administrator and approve the User Account Control (UAC) prompt.
notSupportedDescription:
Installation is interrupted as soon as Fullscreen Experiense API was not detected on your system.

It is supported since Windows 25H2 version for Handheld Devices.
insufficientPermissionsDescription:
Escalated privileges is required to install AllyFSE.

Please allow it in User Account Control (UAC) prompt.
settingsChooseHomeAppDescription: Choose home application for full screen experience
settingsEnterFseOnStartup: Enter full screen experience on startup
settingsLeaveFseOnHomeExit: Leave full screen experience on home app exit
settingsLeaveFseOnHomeExitDescription: Exit full screen experience mode after Home app was exited
settingsUseCustomSettingsDescription: Change monitoring and startups settings for selected home application
settingsSplashScreenSettingsDescription: Configure Look'n'Feel of splash screen during home app loading
settingsStartupDescription: Apps that start automatically when you sign in full screen experience
settingsAdditionalArgumentsDescription: Command line arguments passed to application
settingsHomeApplicationDetectionDescript: Parameters to detect home application is started
settingsWindowTitleDescription: Title of app window when it have been activated
settingsAlternativeModeDetectionDescript: Parameters to detect home application is started in alternative mode
settingsSecondaryProcessNameDescription: Name of app process for alternative mode
settingsSecondaryWindowClassNameDescript: Alternative Class name of app window
settingsNativeLauncherSelected: * Native launcher is selected, AllyFSE will not be executed
settingsNativeStartupSettingsDescription: Configure startup apps using native windows settings
settingsAdditionalStartupApplicationsDes: Configure specific applications to be executed by AllyFSE on fullscreen experience enter
settingsReportIssueGithub: Report issue or request at Github
settingsReportIssueCodeberg: Report issue or request at Codeberg
settingsUpdateSettingsDescription: Change period and settings of new version check
settingsShowNotificationsDescription: Show popup notifications if new version available
settingsSplashPlayVideoAtLeastOnceDescri: Force video to play at least once even if launcher start is detected
settingsSplashPauseCompletedDescription: Show last frame if video ends before home app starts
settingsAllyEnableAlternativeButtons: Enable alternative ASUS ROG Ally button handling
settingsAllyEnableAlternativeButtonsDesc: Alternative handling for some ASUS Optimization service actions
settingsAllyShortPressRightAction: Set short press action for right button
settingsAllyShortPressLeftAction: Set short press action for left button
settingsAllyLongPressRightAction: Set long press action for right button
settingsAllyShortPressRightActionMode: Set short press action for right button with Mode
settingsAllyShortPressLeftActionMode: Set short press action for left button with Mode
settingsAllyLongPressRightActionMode: Set long press action for right button with Mode
settingsConfirmationsSetupDescription: Set confirmation dialogs on entering and leaving Xbox mode
settingsConfirmationsEnterModeDescriptio: Restart Windows to optimize or start Xbox mode now
